step_rationale: NAD+ precursor; systemic metabolic marker reflecting ischemic energetic stress but not atherothrombotic mechanism.
mechanism: Nicotinamide reflects altered NAD+ metabolism and energetic stress during myocardial ischemia.

references.title: Combining the Strengths of the Explainable Boosting Machine and Metabolomics Approaches for Biomarker Discovery in Acute Myocardial Infarction.

trials.title: Pilot Study to Evaluate the Effect of Nicotinamide Riboside on Immune Activation in Psoriasis
